## Discussion

The value is a [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecRequirement] object. If this object is identical to the one returned by the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecCodeInfoImplicitDesignatedRequirement] key, then there is no explicit designated requirement and the designated requirement in use was generated by the system.

Specify the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecCSRequirementInformation] flag when calling the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecCodeCopySigningInformation(_:_:_:)] function to get this information.

# kSecCodeInfoDesignatedRequirement

**Global Variable**

A keys whose value is the designated requirement of the code.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecCodeInfoDesignatedRequirement: CFString
```

## Discussion

The value is a [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecRequirement] object. If this object is identical to the one returned by the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecCodeInfoImplicitDesignatedRequirement] key, then there is no explicit designated requirement and the designated requirement in use was generated by the system.

Specify the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecCSRequirementInformation] flag when calling the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecCodeCopySigningInformation(_:_:_:)] function to get this information.
title: kSecCodeInfoDesignatedRequirement
